channel.title: Surveillance on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Surveillance on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: ACLU Toolkit Exposes Hidden Police Surveillance Tech Use
item.description: The ACLU of Massachusetts launched a free toolkit for defense attorneys to uncover secret police surveillance tech like Flock, Shot Spotter, and AI reports.

item.title: Face Recognition Tech Sparks Concern
item.description: Explore the latest on face recognition tech, its uses, and the concerns surrounding it, including Meta's testing of military-built software
